projectInfo.name: TaskFlow Pro
projectInfo.description: AI-powered task management SaaS platform for knowledge workers

content.projectDescription: TaskFlow Pro is an AI-powered task management SaaS platform that eliminates the daily burden of manual task prioritization for knowledge workers. By combining contextual AI prioritization, an immersive Focus Mode, and seamless integrations with existing tools, TaskFlow Pro transforms how teams and individuals manage their work.
projectGoals: Reduce time spent on manual task prioritization by 80% through AI-powered contextual scoring
Increase deep work time by 40% via Focus Mode's distraction-reducing interface
Achieve 90% user satisfaction score in first 6 months post-launch
Reach 10,000 monthly active users within the first year
Establish TaskFlow Pro as the leading AI-native task management platform

inScope: Core task management platform with CRUD operations, projects, and labels
AI-powered priority scoring engine with contextual awareness
Focus Mode with configurable session lengths and task counts
Integration platform supporting Slack, Google Calendar, Jira, and GitHub
outOfScope: Enterprise SSO (SAML/SCIM) - planned for enterprise tier
Video conferencing or real-time collaboration features

roles.name: Sarah Chen
roles.responsibilities: Product vision, backlog prioritization, stakeholder communication

roles.name: Marcus Rodriguez
roles.responsibilities: Architecture decisions, code review, technical risk management

roles.name: Dr. Aisha Patel
roles.responsibilities: AI prioritization model development, training, evaluation

roles.name: Jordan Kim
roles.responsibilities: User research, interaction design, usability testing

stakeholders.name: Executive Sponsor - VP Product
stakeholders.interest: Product-market fit, revenue targets, competitive positioning

stakeholders.name: Beta User Group
stakeholders.interest: Feature requests, usability feedback, early access

successCriteria.criterion: Core platform supports 100 concurrent users with <200ms p95 latency
AI prioritization accuracy rated 'helpful' by >80% of users
Zero critical security vulnerabilities at launch

risks.risk: AI model accuracy may not meet user expectations in early release
risks.mitigation: Implement manual override, feedback loop, and progressive trust-building through explainable AI

risks.risk: Integration API changes from third-party providers could break sync
risks.mitigation: Abstract integration layer, webhook monitoring, version-pinned API clients

risks.risk: Competitive response from established players adding AI features
risks.mitigation: Speed to market, focus on depth of AI experience rather than surface features
